perturbation.original_text: ASSIGNMENT: NOW, THEREFORE, for good and valuable consideration, the receipt and adequacy of which are hereby acknowledged, Seller does hereby transfer, sell, assign, convey and deliver to Backhaul all right, title and interest in, to and under the Assigned Intellectual Property, including, without limitation, the Trademarks and Patents set forth on Schedules A and B hereof, respectively, and all goodwill of the Purchased Business associated therewith.
perturbation.changed_text: ASSIGNMENT: NOW, THEREFORE, for good and valuable consideration, the receipt and adequacy of which are hereby acknowledged, Seller shall use its best efforts to transfer, sell, assign, convey and deliver to Backhaul all right, title and interest in, to and under the Assigned Intellectual Property, including, without limitation, the Trademarks and Patents set forth on Schedules A and B hereof, respectively, and all goodwill of the Purchased Business associated therewith.
perturbation.explanation: The original text uses 'does hereby transfer, sell, assign, convey and deliver' implying a definite and binding action. The changed text uses 'shall use its best efforts to transfer, sell, assign, convey and deliver,' introducing ambiguity and making the transfer subject to effort rather than guaranteed. This contradicts the intention for immediate and unconditional transfer of property in the original agreement. This change will affect the enforceability of the contract because Backhaul may need to prove Seller's lack of 'best efforts' in case of incomplete transfers, rather than directly claiming breach of contract. This contradicts the part of the text where it says 'Backhaul title to all right, title and interest of Seller in, to and under the Assigned Intellectual Property', because the phrase 'best efforts' makes it unsure the transfer of said rights.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Seller hereby covenants and agrees, that from time to time forthwith upon the reasonable written request of Backhaul or Buyer, that Seller will, at Backhaul's cost and expense, do, execute, acknowledge and deliver or cause to be done, executed, acknowledged and delivered, each and all of such further acts, deeds, assignments, transfers, conveyances and assurances as may reasonably be required by Backhaul or Buyer in order to transfer, assign, convey and deliver unto and vest in Backhaul title to all right, title and interest of Seller in, to and under the Assigned Intellectual Property.
perturbation.justification: The original text used definitive language ('does hereby transfer, sell, assign'), indicating an immediate and unconditional transfer. The changed text uses 'shall use its best efforts to transfer, sell, assign,' introducing a condition of 'best efforts,' making the transfer less certain. This contradicts the contradicted text, which states that the Seller will 'transfer, assign, convey and deliver unto and vest in Backhaul title to all right, title and interest of Seller in, to and under the Assigned Intellectual Property.' The 'best efforts' clause creates ambiguity regarding whether the transfer is guaranteed, directly conflicting with the clause that indicates a definite transfer of title and interest.

perturbation.original_text: This Intellectual Property Agreement is subject in all respects to the terms and conditions of the Asset Purchase Agreement and is intended only to document the assignment of the Assigned Intellectual Property. Nothing contained in this Intellectual Property Agreement shall be deemed to supersede any of the obligations, agreements, representations, covenants or warranties of Seller and Buyer contained in the Asset Purchase Agreement.
perturbation.changed_text: This Intellectual Property Agreement is generally subject to the terms and conditions of the Asset Purchase Agreement but aims to provide specific details regarding the assignment of Assigned Intellectual Property, and in cases of conflict, this agreement shall supersede the Asset Purchase Agreement in matters directly related to intellectual property transfer. Nothing contained in the Asset Purchase Agreement shall be deemed to supersede any of the obligations, agreements, representations, covenants or warranties of Seller and Buyer contained in this Intellectual Property Agreement.
perturbation.explanation: The original text clearly states that the Intellectual Property Agreement is *subject in all respects* to the Asset Purchase Agreement and does not supersede it. The modified text introduces a contradiction by stating that in case of conflict, *this agreement shall supersede the Asset Purchase Agreement* in matters directly related to intellectual property transfer. This creates uncertainty about which agreement takes precedence, especially in disputes about intellectual property rights. The final sentence in the `changed_text` is written in a way that the Intelectual Property Agreement takes precedence over the Asset Purchase Agreement, which causes an In-Text Contradiction. This contradicts the sentence that says 'This Intellectual Property Agreement is generally subject to the terms and conditions of the Asset Purchase Agreement'.
perturbation.location: Paragraph related to the Asset Purchase Agreement
perturbation.contradicted_location: Paragraph related to the Asset Purchase Agreement
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Intellectual Property Agreement shall be construed and interpreted according to the laws of the State of Georgia, applicable contracts to be wholly performed within the State of Georgia.
perturbation.justification: The changed text introduces a direct contradiction. The original text states the Intellectual Property Agreement is subordinate to the Asset Purchase Agreement. The changed text asserts that the Intellectual Property Agreement *supersedes* the Asset Purchase Agreement in matters of intellectual property transfer. This directly conflicts with the original hierarchy, creating an ambiguity about which agreement governs in specific situations. The contradiction exists between the phrase 'This Intellectual Property Agreement is generally subject to the terms and conditions of the Asset Purchase Agreement' and the phrase 'this agreement shall supersede the Asset Purchase Agreement in matters directly related to intellectual property transfer' within the 'Changed Text'. The 'Contradicted Text', while not directly related to the conflicting clauses, highlights that there is expectation in the contract for unambiguous interpretation. The Ambiguities - In Text Contradiction definition is met.

perturbation.original_text: Seller hereby covenants and agrees, that from time to time forthwith upon the reasonable written request of Backhaul or Buyer, that Seller will, at Backhaul's cost and expense, do, execute, acknowledge and deliver or cause to be done, executed, acknowledged and delivered, each and all of such further acts, deeds, assignments, transfers, conveyances and assurances as may reasonably be required by Backhaul or Buyer in order to transfer, assign, convey and deliver unto and vest in Backhaul title to all right, title and interest of Seller in, to and under the Assigned Intellectual Property.
perturbation.changed_text: Seller hereby covenants and agrees to consider, but not necessarily fulfill, reasonable written requests from Backhaul or Buyer. Any further acts, deeds, assignments, transfers, conveyances and assurances may be subject to additional negotiation and compensation, at the Seller's discretion. The intention is not to guarantee any specific actions but to maintain open communication regarding intellectual property matters.
perturbation.explanation: The original text specifies that Seller *will* perform all reasonable requests to further the transfer. The changed text weakens this obligation to *consider, but not necessarily fulfill*, with the possibility of additional negotiation and compensation. This contradicts the original intention to ensure the transfer and vest the property title. This change creates an in-text contradiction by stating the `intention is not to guarantee any specific actions`, while the original agreement implies that the seller guarantees the transfer to be effectively vested. This could give rise to a legal dispute about whether the seller is obligated to do actions to further guarantee the transfer. This contradicts the text `Seller hereby covenants and agrees, that from time to time forthwith upon the reasonable written request of Backhaul or Buyer, that Seller will, at Backhaul's cost and expense, do, execute, acknowledge and deliver or cause to be done, executed, acknowledged and delivered, each and all of such further acts, deeds, assignments, transfers, conveyances and assurances as may reasonably be required by Backhaul or Buyer in order to transfer, assign, convey and deliver unto and vest in Backhaul title to all right, title and interest of Seller in, to and under the Assigned Intellectual Property.`
perturbation.contradicted_text: This Intellectual Property Agreement is subject in all respects to the terms and conditions of the Asset Purchase Agreement and is intended only to document the assignment of the Assigned Intellectual Property. Nothing contained in this Intellectual Property Agreement shall be deemed to supersede any of the obligations, agreements, representations, covenants or warranties of Seller and Buyer contained in the Asset Purchase Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The changed text weakens the seller's obligation to transfer intellectual property, stating that they will only *consider* requests and that further actions are subject to negotiation, explicitly stating that the intention is to not guarantee specific actions. This directly contradicts the contradicted text, which states that the Intellectual Property Agreement is subject to the Asset Purchase Agreement and does not supersede any of the Seller's obligations contained therein. This introduces a clear in-text contradiction.
